aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical gaps in online presence and customer engagement.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Optimize website content with targeted keywords related to services and location.
Enhance the website's mobile responsiveness and loading speed.

gbp_analysis.summary: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) was found, which is a significant gap for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of a GBP means the business is invisible in Google Maps and local search packs.
No customer reviews or ratings to build trust and credibility.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on the website but lacks citations on other platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema beyond basic JSON-LD and Microdata.
Missing LocalBusiness schema with detailed service and location information.
No Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of a Google Business Profile and customer reviews severely limits local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local remodeling services on Google and Google Maps.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up a Google Business Profile and actively managing customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing high-quality, keyword-optimized content and engaging with the local community.

page_title: Remodeling Experts | Kitchen, Bath and Additions in Bethesda, MD
